programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The discovery of a body at a ramshackle farm alerts Wycliffe to the fact that a murderer is at large in a sleepy Cornish village - and when two locals disappear, he realises it will take all his deductive powers to solve the mystery. Whodunit, starring Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Things may be about to change for Nick when a new inspector arrives and Kate receives a job offer. Elsewhere, Greengrass struggles with his finances. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy is determined to go it alone. Kelly asks Lisa for a pay rise for Roy. Zak loses his temper with Kelly and Paddy. The Windsors' party gets underway

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Scott is determined to get himself a job. Paddy spends his first night at the Dingles. Chris is annoyed that Reynolds has undercut him again. Zoe has some bad news for Paddy

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly panics about his speech. Leanne is jealous of Nick's relationship with Gail. Fiona is annoyed when Pam tells Steve to stay away from her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Roy invites Hayley for a meal at the cafe. She tells Roy she really likes him, but also has a confession to make. Samantha is desperate for some space from Des

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: After enjoying a trip to the theatre with Captain Hastings, the detective is disturbed by the sound of gunshots in an apartment at Whitehaven Mansions, and soon finds himself investigating a murder. Drama, starring David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A ritual killing in a village church points to the work of a satanic cult, but the detective thinks local animosity might actually hold the key to the mystery. Detective drama, starring Jack Shepherd

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The death of an unpopular art dealer leaves Poirot with a long list of suspects within his tangled, squabbling family - even though his eccentric wife had predicted his end. Detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Emma Fielding, Fiona Walker and Jeremy Northam

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Ann Smith, a 53-year-old grandmother from Watford, is haunted by unanswered questions about her past. As a baby, Ann was adopted by George and Jean Smith, but despite growing up in a loving family, Ann was always aware that she was different, and began the search for her birth mother. Meanwhile, 73-year-old Derek Berg searches for his brother who was given up by his parents. His mother Freda had an affair with an Allied soldier, and like many other illegitimate wartime babies, Derek's long lost sibling was put up for adoption

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is found dead in her home, Brooks and Devlin cannot be sure a crime was even committed. On further investigation, an unlikely murder weapon is uncovered and a suspect identified - a recently released serial rapist. Determined the accused is guilty, Steel pursues him with every power available - pushing the boundaries of the law to the limit. Crime drama, guest starring Kevin Doyle (Drop Dead Gorgeous), with Ben Daniels

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Three people are murdered in a shop in central London and a fourth is left for dead, and Brooks and Devlin are up against the clock to find a killer who they fear could strike again. When a suspect is brought to trial, Steel's hopes for a relatively straightforward case are dashed when he finds himself pitted against a brilliant defence lawyer. Crime drama, guest starring Rupert Graves and Amanda Root

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a retired university fellow leads to a complex investigation for Morse and Lewis as they piece together a story of student suicide, drugs and the mysterious dismissal of a loyal college scout. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Phyllis Logan, Gabrielle Lloyd, Amanda Ryan and Tony Haygarth

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alina gets raided by immigration officers. Cathy comes clean when Brian's persecution continues. Harvey drags Simon along as he heads into Leanne's trap.

programme.title: Man About the House

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The housemates are put out when Chrissy's mother arrives for an unscheduled visit. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the detective drama, starring Jack Shepherd as the Cornish copper. When a bookshop owner is murdered in Penzance, the detective discovers all is not harmonious between the members of one of the area's most prominent families. With Kevin Quarmby and Carla Mendonca

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of archaeology student Celia Dawe and the significance of matching playing cards lead Wycliffe on a manhunt across Cornwall. Police drama based on the novel by WJ Burley, guest starring Bill Nighy alongside Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of an amateur flautist and the disappearance of a maid on a secluded country estate soon have Detective Superintendent Charles Wycliffe unravelling a mystery involving family feuds and illicit relationships. Police drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The detective discovers his half-sister's daughter has committed suicide and sets out to find what prompted it, entering the world of teenage rave parties and drug-taking. Meanwhile, Lewis has his sights set on promotion and studies for exams. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Sorcha Cusack, Jason Isaacs and John Junkin

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A former bookie falls under suspicion for the murder of a hospital benefactor, who is found dead in his car. As the detectives investigate the case, it becomes clear their prime suspect had a strong motive, believing the victim was responsible for putting his daughter into a coma. Brian Cox guest stars, with John Thaw and Kevin Whately

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute leads to murder after a stalwart in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe as Barnaby and Jones investigate. Guest starring Hugo Speer (Bleak House), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby reluctantly joins wife Joyce on a spa weekend at Swavely Manor, a country house offering treatments to soothe the mind and body. However, as he attempts to unwind, a woman is found dead in a flotation chamber and he promptly abandons his therapy to investigate - but the body count soon rises. The detective eventually wraps up the case, but it proves to be his last as he makes a big decision about his future. John Nettles' final appearance in the long-running series, with guest stars Ronni Ancona, Geraldine James and Lesley Manville

programme.title: The Suspicions of Mr Whicher
programme.desc: Feature-length period drama based on the book by Kate Summerscale. Inspector Jack Whicher is part of the newly formed Scotland Yard detective department and travels to Rode, Wiltshire, to investigate a murder at a country house. With no material evidence and only an inept local police force to help, he faces the unenviable task of solving a case in which members of the grieving family are the main suspects. Starring Paddy Considine, Peter Capaldi and Emma Fielding

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Unexplained killings rock the Bodmin community, giving rise to fears that the so-called 'beast', a monster enshrined in local legend, has returned to wreak fresh havoc. Kersey ventures up onto the moors to investigate and does not return - so Wycliffe is forced to go it alone. Jack Shepherd and Jimmy Yuill star

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks and Devlin are called to investigate when a man is attacked and his kidney is surgically removed. The focus quickly turns to finding the intended recipient of the organ, and the team is horrified to discover that it has been trafficked into the NHS and given to wealthy patient Joanna Woodleigh. When the case is handed over to the CPS, a conflict of interests becomes apparent as Steel and Phillips go up against George Castle in court. Denis Lawson guest stars, with Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Freema Agyeman

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks and Devlin investigate the death of middle-class teenager Debbie Powell. They discover the victim had been living a secret life as a drugs mule, and was being led astray by local dealer Gerry Craig. The case has an emotional impact on Castle, who demands Steel and Phillips do everything in their power to bring the person responsible to justice. Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Bill Paterson star

programme.title: Carry On Up the Khyber (1968)
programme.desc: British forces in colonial India find themselves in deep trouble when a manic local ruler discovers the soldiers' fearsome reputation is thoroughly undeserved - prompting open rebellion. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Roy Castle, Joan Sims, Bernard Bresslaw and Terry Scott

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: An ancient Cornish folk ritual ends in the murder of a local undertaker - and provides quick-witted copper Charles Wycliffe with one of the most baffling mysteries of his career. Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters, Jimmy Yuill and Susan Penhaligon star

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The discovery of a body at a ramshackle farm alerts Wycliffe to the fact that a murderer is at large in a sleepy Cornish village - and when two locals disappear, he realises it will take all his deductive powers to solve the mystery. Whodunit, starring Jack Shepherd and Helen Masters

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An opera singer is shot by a sniper at an Oxford University ceremony just as she is about to receive an honorary degree. Morse is a big fan of her work and thinks she could not possibly be involved in anything untoward, but his investigations turn up more than a few sordid secrets. Detective drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Robert Hardy, Sheila Gish, John Gielgud and Rachel Weisz

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering five people is killed in prison shortly before going to trial, wrapping up a lot of loose ends and saving the state the expense of keeping him behind bars indefinitely. Alas, Morse cannot help wondering why the body of one of his victims was never found - and the chance discovery of a corpse gives him the perfect opportunity to investigate further. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As plans to build a new police station lead Morse to question his place in the force, he investigates the case of Tommy Cork, a boy from a broken home who has disappeared. Meanwhile, the body of disreputable journalist Eric Patterson has been found on railway tracks in mysterious circumstances. He was last seen embroiled in an argument with a council official about a company preparing to redevelop the site of Blenheim Vale, a disused correctional facility for boys. When a petty criminal with a connection to Blenheim absconds from an open prison, it sets off a chain reaction of events that threaten to expose horrors of the past. Did missing Tommy witness something that cost him his life?

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Angela Brennan believed she was adopted, but at 18 her mother revealed she had an older sister, also called Angela, who had been put up for adoption by her parents. Cameras follow Angela's search for her namesake sibling. Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell also examine the story of Bronwen Hook. When her son, Mark, was born, she did her best to raise him, but Bronwen found being responsible for a baby hard, and gave him up for adoption. She's always hoped she would see Mark again. Will she finally get her chance?

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's India
programme.desc: Joanna's adventures across India conclude as she explores Rajasthan, Delhi and the mountainous North West, before ending in Kashmir, the place of her birth. Her first stop takes her to the Ranthambhore National Park, where she learns about the Wildlife Protection Society of India's tiger conservation programmes. Joanna's next stop takes her to the city of Delhi, where she begins her exploration of the capital at Humayun's Tomb, before ending her 5000 mile journey in Srinagar in Kashmi, the place where she was born

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway appears to have got over his fear of Lewis treading over his newly promoted toes. programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin introduces some of the great racehorses of the modern era, including Nijinsky, Tiger Roll, Best Mate, Desert Orchid and Shergar

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Prince John arrives at Sherwood with a mysterious prisoner in tow, and the outlaws hatch a plan to rescue him - little suspecting the effect he will have on Marion. Fantasy drama, starring Michael Praed

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Conclusion. Despite his reservations, Hornblower is reluctant to dishonour his bride-to-be by leaving her standing at the altar. However, with the ink barely dry on the marriage certificate, a surprise guest at the wedding breakfast despatches the groom to France on a mission to uncover the whereabouts of a missing sloop and its captain, Bracegirdle. En route, Hornblower rescues two strangers caught in a storm. Historical Navy drama, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay, Paul McGann and Lorcan Cranitch

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell and the team are at Aintree on Grand National day ahead of the world's most famous horse race. With guests AP McCoy and Mick Fitzgerald

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from December 1979, including Chelsea v Swansea City, Newcastle United v Queens Park Rangers and Liverpool v Crystal Palace

programme.title: Euro 2020 Preview Show
programme.desc: Profiles of the teams from Spain and Austria, and a look back at France's performance at Euro 2000

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1990s, including Italia 90 and Euro 96

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Going inside a soup factory, learning about the UK's finest pool tables, visiting the last remaining UK television factory and learning the secrets of making silk ties. Tim Healy narrates

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley is tasked with finding out whether a woman is crying wolf with her tales of being terrorised by a masked stalker. Suspicion falls on one of her work colleagues, an inveterate human rights campaigner, who keeps pictures of her in his flat. Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson star

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to a remote river in the Australian Outback in a bid to catch the rare and fearsome freshwater sawfish, which is reputed to reach 18ft long and attack boats. In his quest to discover more about the predator, he roams across an ancient landscape, encountering scientists and a real-life Crocodile Dundee, before finally confronting the disturbing truth

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers (1959)
programme.desc: A Union cavalry officer is ordered to demolish a railway junction in the middle of Confederate territory, but finds his authority constantly challenged by a military surgeon assigned to accompany him. John Ford's Western, based on an actual Civil War incident, starring John Wayne, William Holden, Constance Towers, Hoot Gibson and Anna Lee

programme.title: Ben-Hur (1959)
programme.desc: A Jewish prince in first-century Jerusalem is reunited with an old Roman friend, who is now the governor of Judea. However, their differing political views over local dissent leads to a bitter quarrel, and the governor uses the pretext of an accident to sell him into slavery and imprison his mother and sister. Years later, the prince returns, determined to seek revenge and find his missing family. Oscar-winning epic, starring Charlton Heston, Stephen Boyd and Haya Harareet

Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle investigate the murder of a prostitute, but their only clues are a pornographic film and a Eastern bloc-backed plot to blackmail a prominent politician tipped to become a future prime minister. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry minds a boxer, but is less than impressed to discover the promoter is betting on his opponent to win the next bout. Arthur, meanwhile, switches bets. Alfred Marks, Paul Barber and Vicki Michelle guest star

programme.desc: Fisherman Ali Hamidi is joined by Tom Dove and Neil Spooner to catch buffalo carp in Texas

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Prince John arrives at Sherwood with a mysterious prisoner in tow, and the outlaws hatch a plan to rescue him - little suspecting the effect he will have on Marion. Fantasy drama, starring Michael Praed

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Conclusion. Despite his reservations, Hornblower is reluctant to dishonour his bride-to-be by leaving her standing at the altar. However, with the ink barely dry on the marriage certificate, a surprise guest at the wedding breakfast despatches the groom to France on a mission to uncover the whereabouts of a missing sloop and its captain, Bracegirdle. En route, Hornblower rescues two strangers caught in a storm. Historical Navy drama, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay, Paul McGann and Lorcan Cranitch

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell and the team are at Aintree on Grand National day ahead of the world's most famous horse race. With guests AP McCoy and Mick Fitzgerald

programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from December 1979, including Chelsea v Swansea City, Newcastle United v Queens Park Rangers and Liverpool v Crystal Palace

programme.title: Euro 2020 Preview Show
programme.desc: Profiles of the teams from Spain and Austria, and a look back at France's performance at Euro 2000

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1990s, including Italia 90 and Euro 96

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Going inside a soup factory, learning about the UK's finest pool tables, visiting the last remaining UK television factory and learning the secrets of making silk ties. Tim Healy narrates

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley is tasked with finding out whether a woman is crying wolf with her tales of being terrorised by a masked stalker. Suspicion falls on one of her work colleagues, an inveterate human rights campaigner, who keeps pictures of her in his flat. Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson star

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to a remote river in the Australian Outback in a bid to catch the rare and fearsome freshwater sawfish, which is reputed to reach 18ft long and attack boats. In his quest to discover more about the predator, he roams across an ancient landscape, encountering scientists and a real-life Crocodile Dundee, before finally confronting the disturbing truth

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers (1959)
programme.desc: A Union cavalry officer is ordered to demolish a railway junction in the middle of Confederate territory, but finds his authority constantly challenged by a military surgeon assigned to accompany him. John Ford's Western, based on an actual Civil War incident, starring John Wayne, William Holden, Constance Towers, Hoot Gibson and Anna Lee

Finally, it's Springfield House and owner Lucinda and friend Diane want to put two of the guests at ease, but it's the payments where true feelings are expressed

programme.title: Live Heineken Champions Cup Rugby Union
programme.desc: La Rochelle v Sale Sharks (Kick-off 3.00pm). Lee McKenzie presents coverage of the quarter-final match from Stade Marcel-Deflandre. This is La Rochelle's first ever quarter final appearance in the Champions Cup, and Sale Sharks' first quarter final in 15 years. With commentary by Miles Harrison, Jamie Heaslip and Danielle Waterman, and pitchside reports from Ed Jackson

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Gallery owner Elinor and fitness entrepreneur Born set themselves the task of creating Britain's first hypoallergenic house in a leafy back garden plot in south-west London. Driven by the need to alleviate their two young sons' life-threatening allergies, their new part-submerged, shed-inspired home, will be constructed using low toxin materials and deploy cutting-edge filtration systems to clean the air they breathe. Will their innovative new house deliver the benefits Elinor and Born are hoping for?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: His Royal Highness The Duke of Edinburgh - Royal Obituary
programme.desc: A portrait of the life of the Duke of Edinburgh, Prince Philip, who supported Queen Elizabeth II in her demanding role for over six decades and died at the age of 99. Matt Frei meets those who knew him

programme.title: The Royal House of Windsor
programme.desc: This episode reveals how Prince Philip was the Windsors' most radical moderniser, and explores how he compensated for his emasculated status in one of the most daring experiments in modernisation attempted by the Windsors. The focus also falls on the formidable opposition that the young Queen Elizabeth II faced during her early years in the throne, as influential figures opposed her bearing her husband's family name, Mountbatten

programme.title: Alien: Covenant (2017)
programme.desc: A crew of colonists sent to populate an alien planet have their mission diverted by a mysterious signal. After landing on a nearby world, they discover what became of the ill-fated Prometheus mission. Ridley Scott's sci-fi thriller, starring Katherine Waterston, Michael Fassbender and Danny McBride

programme.title: The Shallows (2016)
programme.desc: A surfer strays into the hunting territory of a great white shark, and finds herself stranded on a tiny island a mere 200 yards from the shore. With the deadly aquatic predator between her and the beach and her safe haven slowly disappearing as the tide comes in, she faces a life or death struggle to get safely back to dry land. Thriller, starring Blake Lively and Oscar Jaenada

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival duos compete in Glasgow, where highlights include a bit of karaoke, a game of Guess That Tune and one menu inspired by moments in the couple's relationship

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Maxine is shocked when Brad makes a pass at her, Luke takes his anger out on Mandy, and Cher has a tough decision to make

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: Davina McCall hosts as twin sisters from Enfield in north London and a mother and son from Cumbria take part in the quiz in which contestants can win up to £100,000

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Brendan is still shell-shocked by last night's vote, until his day is brightened by the arrival of some new tourists - as well as some action-packed fun on the water

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Brendan is still shell-shocked by last night's vote, until his day is brightened by the arrival of some new tourists - as well as some action-packed fun on the water

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard confronts the man who tormented him in high school, while Penny realises she did her fair share of bullying in the past and calls the people she targeted to apologise. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is uninterested in Amy's career, so Penny, Raj and Leonard try to make him understand that sometimes it benefits a relationship to pretend to care about a partner's achievements. Howard notices Bernadette is uncomfortable around children when she helps him perform a magic show at his nephew's birthday party

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard asks Penny out on a date, and they agree to give their relationship another chance. They soon remember why it did not work out in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. The 100th episode of the comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Miss Hoover asks her students to research their family history, Lisa is distressed to discover that most of her forebears seem to have been crooks and deadbeats. Then she finds an old diary in the attic that was written by her ancestor, Eliza Simpson, and describes a remarkable 19th-century adventure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart decides to steal a kiss from his crush at school after taking advice from Grampa, but the plan backfires when she reacts in disgust. Lisa's popularity soars after she receives a bad grade, but when it turns out to be mistake and the bullying resumes, her spirits are lifted by a visit from Michelle Obama. With the guest voices of Angela Bassett and Sarah Silverman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer heads to Jerusalem with Flanders and his Bible study group, but he is abandoned when he fails to take the trip seriously. Stranded in the desert, he has a hallucination that convinces him he is God's chosen one. With the guest voice of comedian Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns throws a party to celebrate Independence Day, but uses the event to exploit his employees. Homer and his colleagues fight back, and when the police arrive they discover a set of stolen masterpiece paintings in the mansion, the owner of Springfield Nuclear Power Plant is promptly sent to prison, where he makes a friend who tries to change his cruel ways

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa and Bart head to the seaside in the hope of finding treasure that has washed ashore during a storm. Instead, they encounter a beached whale, which Lisa immediately becomes emotionally attached to. Meanwhile, Homer receives a huge electricity bill and takes drastic action to prevent it from happening again

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Sharleen Spiteri talks about the new Texas album, Hi. Jordan Banjo chats about his children's book, Fly High Crew: The Green Glow. Comedian Tez Ilyas discusses his book, The Secret Diary of a British Muslim Aged 13 3/4. Professional boxer Lawrence Okolie talks about his book, Dare to Change Your Life. Joe Pasquale talks about the UK tour of the play April in Paris, and Colman Domingo chats about the TV series Fear the Walking Dead. Nathan Dawe and Anne-Marie provide the music

programme.title: A Taste of Italy
programme.desc: Nisha Katona samples a range of dishes in Viterbo, a hilltop city with a papal history in Lazio. She tastes freshwater lake fish from the largest volcanic crater lake in Europe and tries acquacotta viterbese - a traditional soup of local vegetables, herbs and a poached egg. The chef and restaurateur also visits a salami emporium where she savours susianella di Viterbo - a local delicacy of liver and offal sausage - and inspired by her discoveries, cooks poached fish and vegetables with hazelnut butter

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, pop star Nadine Coyle and wheelchair basketball player-turned-presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. Under the watchful eye of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, the celebrity bakers attempt decorative choux buns in the signature and tackle financiers in the technical before making a showstopping cake that represents something from their bucket list

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa is press-ganged into babysitting Bart, Lisa and Maggie while Marge and Homer visit a rural retreat in a bid to save their ailing marriage

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another of Matt Groening's creations, Bender from Futurama, drops into Springfield, where Bart and Lisa are busy admiring Professor Frink's new invention - a computer that shows the future. Unable to resist, they take a look at what their lives will be like in eight years' time - and are surprised by what they see

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2010)
programme.desc: A clumsy Viking boy longs to become a mighty dragon slayer and protect his village from the fearsome flying lizards, but his father thinks he is not up to the task. However, when he sets out to prove his worth, he ends up befriending a dragon, and realises his people may have misjudged the creatures. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Jay Baruchel and Gerard Butler

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge attempt to renovate the orangery with the help of a roofing expert and some pre-loved slate, all the way from Wales. They also discover some unexpected history beneath their feet, and Angel finds two old daybeds in need of upcycling

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again (2018)
programme.desc: A sinister cyber attack reveals the identity of all active undercover agents in Britain. Hapless secret agent Johnny English is sent on a mission to the South of France to protect Queen and country, and find the mastermind hacker responsible. Third movie in the comedy series, starring Rowan Atkinson, Ben Miller and Olga Kurylenko

programme.title: The Real Prince Philip: A Royal Officer
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the Duke of Edinburgh's life and career, emphasising the role his military experiences played in his later achievements, and how that his ethos of 'service' and 'duty' was forged during his impressive naval career

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics voice their opinions on shows including Made in Chelsea, Dragons' Den, Line of Duty, Louis Theroux: Shooting Joe Exotic, The Invisible Man and The Graham Norton Show. Plus, they share their observations on news reports concerning beer and the coronavirus

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel (2017)
programme.desc: Having sworn revenge against his relative's widow, a young Englishman finds his plans soon change after they finally meet. Drama based on the Daphne Du Maurier novel, starring Rachel Weisz, Sam Claflin and Holliday Grainger

programme.title: Heineken Champions Cup Rugby: The Big Tackle

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Market trader Russell and retired nurse Nicola kick-off proceedings in Essex and the evening seems to go well with one diner polishing off his own food - and everyone else's. The second night sees proud parents Sophie and Elliot host, but their guests find crab claws in their starter. On the third evening romantic duo Gemma and Glen decide to go for a more refined dining experience in the hope of winning the cash prize of £1,000. However, it's Gemma's love for burlesque that grabs most attention

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a father and son planning to convert an oil rig escape boat into a floating home, and an inventor working on a perfectly spherical house. programme.title: The £100k Drop

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: On Day 10, one tourist takes a shine to a local handball instructor, and one couple are surprised to find themselves targeted at voting time

programme.title: Kirstie's Fill Your House for Free

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the words-and-numbers game, with Konnie Huq joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane is furious to learn Sam has entered a photo of her for the Miss Boston Barmaid contest - until it dawns on her that she can use the media attention as a platform for her opinions. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam discovers Coach is being taken for a ride by a so-called friend, so he and the regulars plot to beat the con-artist at his own game. Nicholas Colasanto stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray accidentally kills Ally's pet hamster while the kids are away from home for the weekend, so Debra insists they give it a dignified funeral. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is promoted to lieutenant, much to the dismay of Ray, who feels overshadowed and becomes convinced his own prestige is suffering as a result. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes to a wedding, where he finds himself regretting a missed opportunity to escort a high-school date to her door, and is tormented by thoughts of what might have been. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bulldog plays a practical joke on Frasier, who wastes no time in plotting revenge. Meanwhile, Niles and Daphne get caught up in a battle with a doorstep trick-or-treater. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A workmate agrees to teach Frasier enough Hebrew to deliver the speech at his son Frederick's bar mitzvah, but the arrangement ends in double-dealing and mutual recrimination. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: In the first of a three-part story, Frasier struggles to replace Daphne and ends up hiring a woman who proves to be completely unsuitable. Meanwhile, Niles experiences an amazing chain of events, including winning the same competition twice and having his car struck by lightning

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge demonstrates how he maintains his land on his trusty tractor. Couple Emma and Paul have bought a chateau in northern France. Carpenter Paul crafts a safety fence for their elevated swimming pool, Emma tackles their maze, and their first paying guests arrive. Cameras also capture Clive and his family, including 20-year-old daughter Abbie, who manages their 36-bedroom chateau in the Dordogne Valley. Getting their chateau ready for the wedding season, the family tackle the leaky roof and refresh the bedrooms, but the furniture proves tricky to fit.And three sisters raised in the UK travel to France in search of the perfect chateau, but they have a very long checklist

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In South Yorkshire, chatty couple Kealey and Nathan begin with an international-themed menu. However, when well-to-do Graham and wife Sarah discover they're doing exactly the same dessert, the cheesecake war is on. Later, the youngsters of the group, Alex and Emily, offer up some European culinary delights

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game where contestants pit their wits against the clock. Nicki Chapman is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Elvis fan Sandra and her husband Desmond seek help in their search for their dream holiday home near Mar Menor's stunning beaches on Spain's Costa Calida. They would ideally like a property with three bedrooms for when their family come to visit. Danni Menzies has five options for their £150,000 budget, but whether the couple will be impressed enough to put in an offer remains to be seen

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A Londoner gets a reality check as she prepares to open a bar in the south of France, while a Kent couple sink all their savings into a holiday business in Tarn et Garonne

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is committed to a mental institution by an exasperated Marge, who refuses to believe his improbable tales about befriending a mysterious roofing contractor and fears he is finally cracking up. With the guest voices of Ray Romano and Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sanjay's son turns the Kwik-E-Mart into a health-food store against Apu's insistence on tradition. Bart renounces his devotion to pranks after his mischief has unforeseen consequences, but is called upon to return to his wicked ways and take down the new enterprise

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Sienna takes things a step too far with her plan to win back Brody, and Imran fears that he and Brooke are drifting apart

programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.desc: Morland Sanders reports on the future of workers' rights in the UK in the wake of lockdown and departure from the EU. The programme examines evidence of safety breaches, low pay, and dangerous pressures at the heart of the gig economy, and revealing how gig-based working practices are becoming more commonplace, even appearing in organisations like the NHS

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver takes a simple sausage and transforms it into a stunning baked casserole, with potato dumplings that are crispy on the top and soft on the bottom. He also prepares a warm aubergine dish dressed with homemade pesto and served on a bed of fresh salad, with a crisp, garlic flatbread on the side

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: An investigating officer for Bedfordshire Police deals with the case of a man left at the brink of death following a violent incident at home, and realises the victim is a man who came to see her at the station the day before - leaving her wondering if she could have prevented the attack before it happened

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Cameras follow the paramedic teams of West Midlands Ambulance Service, beginning with a crew treating a man found collapsed in his garden in Birmingham. programme.title: Gogglebox

Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Carol tells Ross she plans to raise his child with her lover Susan, but he can be involved if he wants. Ross and Monica's parents announce they are coming to dinner, while Rachel is aghast to discover her former fiance went on what would have been their honeymoon with her maid of honour

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica shows off her new boyfriend to the rest of the group, Chandler decides to take up smoking again and Phoebe makes a gruesome discovery that leads to her receiving a windfall. Starring Courteney Cox, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is rejected by his family and Phoebe is not relishing the thought of spending the holidays with her grandmother and her boyfriend, prompting a mass exodus to Monica's for Thanksgiving dinner. Meanwhile, Ross hears Susan is trying to communicate with his and Carol's unborn child

programme.title: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang (1968)
programme.desc: Eccentric inventor Caractacus Potts rescues an old car from the scrapheap, only to discover it has magical, gravity-defying powers. Meanwhile, Baron Bomburst, the blundering ruler of Vulgaria, will do anything to get his greedy hands on it. Children's musical adventure, based on the book by Ian Fleming, starring Dick Van Dyke, Lionel Jeffries, Sally Ann Howes, Gert Frobe, Benny Hill and James Robertson Justice

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

Children's musical adventure, based on the book by Ian Fleming, starring Dick Van Dyke, Lionel Jeffries, Sally Ann Howes, Gert Frobe, Benny Hill and James Robertson Justice

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Crooked House
programme.desc: Adaptation of the mystery novel, starring Max Irons and Terence Stamp. Charles, the son of the assistant commissioner at Scotland Yard returns to London from Cairo following the end of the Second World War, only to discover his fiancee's grandfather has been murdered. He uses his father's connections to become involved in the investigation, and finds the dead man's second wife a likely suspect. However, nobody in the household has an alibi, and Charles' fiancee may have the clearest motive for murder. With Gillian Anderson and Glenn Close

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Crooked House
programme.desc: Adaptation of the mystery novel, starring Max Irons and Terence Stamp. Charles, the son of the assistant commissioner at Scotland Yard returns to London from Cairo following the end of the Second World War, only to discover his fiancee's grandfather has been murdered. He uses his father's connections to become involved in the investigation, and finds the dead man's second wife a likely suspect. However, nobody in the household has an alibi, and Charles' fiancee may have the clearest motive for murder. With Gillian Anderson and Glenn Close

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: The comedian aboard her vintage camper van, explores the Pembroke coast in Wales. She begins her 130-mile road trip just north of Pembrokeshire near the town of Cardigan, then follows the coastline south to Carmarthenshire, ending her trip at Pendine Sands. Her first visit is to the Teifi River where she's invited to paddle an unusually small boat called a coracle, then it's on to the Blue Lagoon for a spot of cliff jumping. Next, Susan samples Welsh seaweed delicacy laverbread at Broadhaven Beach, before visiting the home of the celebrated Welsh poet Dylan Thomas

programme.title: Jane McDonald's Weekends Away
programme.desc: The singer embarks on short weekend breaks in Europe, the UK and the USA, and shares her pick of the best destinations for a short break. In Valetta, the historic 16th-century capital city of Malta, Jane spends a couple of days soaking up the culture and visiting the famous sites. She starts her visit with a water-taxi tour around the bay, and then joins a private walking tour around the heart of the old city, including the fountain, main entrance gates, amphitheatre and finishing at St John's Co-cathedral

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: The story of Winston Churchill's return from the political wilderness to become the heroic war leader many still celebrate today. Though Churchill stood against India's move towards independence, his warnings about Nazi Germany were thought by some to be misplaced, and eventually he was proved right. In this episode, those closest to him reveal the true story behind the most important speech of his life

programme.title: We Love Dad's Army
programme.desc: The story behind one of the best-loved British sitcoms, from humble beginnings to smash hit. This show celebrates all of Dad's Army's iconic catchphrases, the hilarious stunts, and goes behind the scenes to discover what happened when the cameras stopped rolling. Former cast member Ian Lavender reflects on the show, and there are also contributions from Jonathan Ross, John Thompson, Al Murray, Eammon Holmes, Kelly Holmes and many others

programme.title: Britain's Favourite Comedy
programme.desc: Jo Brand presents a celebration of great sketches of the 1970s, 80s and 90s, with each show featuring archive material and contributions from the writers and performers themselves, beginning with selection from the 1970s. Turning their attention further afield, the stars share some of their most memorable holiday tales, including transforming a hotel corridor into one long 'slip-and-slide', the suspicious discovery of a pair of chicken fillets in a swimming pool in Marbella, and a blush-inducing incident involving a naked paragliding session along a Spanish beachfront

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After taking pity on a single mother, landlord Ronnie discovered mystery occupants have turned his property into a scrap metal merchants. programme.title: Kate Humble's Coastal Britain
programme.desc: On a 15-mile walk in North Yorkshire, Kate sets off from the picturesque settlement of Robin Hood's Bay, where archaeologist Maria explains how, in the 18th century, the fishing village's position made it an idea drop-off point for contraband shipped from Holland and France. From here, Kate heads south along the coast, meeting up with geologist Will, who reveals what dinosaur footprints can reveal about the creatures that once roamed the area. After arriving at her destination in Scarborough, Kate dons her wetsuit to join a group of swimmers braving the North Sea

programme.title: Kate Humble's Coastal Britain
programme.desc: Starting in Dorset on Stonebarrow Hill, the naturalist walks a 13-mile stretch of the South West Coast Path. Her first stop is at Charmouth, a place well-known for fossil hunting, where local girl Mary Anning found an ichthyosaur in the early 19th century. At Lyme Regis, Kate discovers the lengths and costs engineers have gone to in order to protect the town, before visiting a local mill listed in the Doomsday Book. After a spell bird spotting in the Seaton Wetlands, Kate enjoys a tour of the area's limestone mines before making her way to Beer Point, which boasts wonderful views of the sea

programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old nightclub dancer Courtney and 17-year-old ultra-vain Charlie face up to life on the frozen Mongolian plains as they spend a week with a family of hardy Kazakhs in a communal tent. The pair consume the local cuisine - including horse meat - and contend with only the most basic sanitation. They also learn to appreciate that for the Kazakh tribe, even getting water involves a major expedition to a frozen river to hack out blocks of ice

programme.title: The Rugrats Movie (1998)
programme.desc: Tommy tries to return his new brother to the baby shop, helped by Angelica, Chuckie, Phil and Lil - but the friends become lost in dense woodlands en route, turning their expedition into a scary and exciting journey of discovery. Animated comedy based on the TV series, with the voices of Elizabeth Daily, Christine Cavanaugh, Kath Soucie, Whoopi Goldberg and Busta Rhymes

programme.title: Alpha (2018)
programme.desc: Europe, 20,000 years ago, and a young man is left for dead while hunting with his tribe. After forming an alliance with a lone wolf that was abandoned by its pack, the duo attempts to make their way to safety. Prehistoric adventure, starring Kodi Smit-McPhee and Jóhannes Haukur Jóhannesson. Directed by Albert Hughes (The Book of Eli)

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire (1993)
programme.desc: A struggling actor's ambitious, no-nonsense wife throws him out and demands a divorce. Desperate to spend time with his children, he puts his talents to good use by donning drag and posing as a British housekeeper to get a job looking after them. Comedy, starring Robin Williams, Sally Field, Pierce Brosnan, Harvey Fierstein and Mara Wilson

programme.title: Leap Year (2010)
programme.desc: A woman plans to take advantage of an Irish tradition to propose to her boyfriend while on holiday in Dublin. When they become separated, she faces a disastrous journey across the country in the company of a charming local innkeeper, and is tempted to leave her boyfriend for her travelling companion. Romantic comedy, starring Amy Adams, Matthew Goode and Adam Scott

programme.title: Hampstead (2017)
programme.desc: Bored American widow Emily becomes involved with Donald, a gruff Irish loner living wild on Hampstead Heath, even though the worlds they inhabit could not be more different. When his home is threatened by greedy real estate developers, she believes she has found her new cause - but gets more than she bargained for when unexpected romance blossoms. Romantic comedy drama, starring Brendan Gleeson, Diane Keaton and James Norton

programme.title: Skyscraper (2018)
programme.desc: A former hostage negotiator takes a job as a security expert at the world's tallest building in Hong Kong. He finds himself framed for sabotage when the skyscraper bursts into flames. As he strives to clear his name, he must also fight his way back into the blazing tower to rescue his family, who are being held hostage by criminals 225 storeys up. Action thriller, starring Dwayne Johnson, Neve Campbell and Chin Han

programme.title: Slender Man (2018)
programme.desc: Friends Hallie, Chloe, Wren and Katie conjure up online creature the Slender Man, a tall, chilling figure with a blank face. Two weeks later, Katie mysteriously disappears during a class trip to a graveyard, and the girls suspect their creation may be responsible. Horror thriller, starring Joey King, Julia Goldani Telles and Jaz Sinclair

programme.title: Tale of Tales (2015)
programme.desc: Anthology of three fairytales, following a queen whose obsessive desire for children has terrible consequences, two reclusive sisters who provoke the passion of a king, and a ruler whose obsession with a giant flea leads to his daughter being married to an ogre. Fantasy based on the stories of Giambattista Basile, starring Salma Hayek, Vincent Cassel and Toby Jones

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: Puss in Boots (2011)
programme.desc: The swashbuckling feline joins forces with a cunning thief and a treacherous old friend to steal a magical golden goose from a giant's castle. He must save the day when it transpires that their actions have unleashed a terrible danger on his home town. Animated comedy spin-off from the Shrek movies, with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Salma Hayek

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2 (2015)
programme.desc: A Cappella group the Barden Bellas enjoy an unprecedented run of success, until a disastrous performance sees them banned from national competitions and beset by scandal. They attempt to turn their fortunes around and redeem their reputation by competing in the World Championships of A Cappella in Copenhagen. Comedy sequel, starring Anna Kendrick and Rebel Wilson

programme.title: Logan (2017)
programme.desc: In the near future, Wolverine cares for an ailing Professor X somewhere on the Mexican border. However, the razor-clawed hero's attempts to hide from the world are turned upside down when a young mutant arrives, pursued by cyborg bounty hunters in the employ of a sinister corporation. Fantasy adventure, starring Hugh Jackman, Patrick Stewart, Dafne Keen and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: American Assassin (2017)
programme.desc: After Mitch Rapp's girlfriend Katrina accepts his wedding proposal during an idyllic European beach holiday, they and many others are gunned down by terrorists. Mitch survives and becomes a master of unarmed combat before the US government consider using him for black ops. Action thriller, starring Dylan O'Brien, Michael Keaton and Sanaa Lathan

programme.title: Brothers of the Head (2005)
programme.desc: Teenage conjoined twins are spotted by a sleazy music promoter and groomed for rock stardom, but begin to struggle with the pressures of fame. Seventies-set drama, starring identical twins Harry and Luke Treadaway, alongside Jonathan Pryce and Sean Harris, and featuring an appearance by film director Ken Russell as himself

programme.desc: A young boy creates a fantasy world to help cope with the alienation he feels at home and at school

programme.title: Teen Wolf (1985)
programme.desc: A teenage misfit is initially dismayed to learn he is a werewolf as a result of a hereditary curse. He finds there are advantages as he becomes a local celebrity, while his enhanced agility makes him the star player of his school's basketball team - but fame quickly goes to his head. Comedy, starring Michael J Fox, James Hampton and Susan Ursitti

programme.title: Harry and the Hendersons (1987)
programme.desc: A hapless family's camping holiday in the mountains is brought to a sudden end when they accidentally hit the legendary Bigfoot with their car. They decide to adopt the endearing creature, but have more trouble than expected trying to keep him concealed and to avoid arousing their neighbours' suspicions. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Melinda Dillon, David Suchet, Don Ameche and Kevin Peter Hall

programme.title: Three Amigos! (1986)
programme.desc: Three silent Western movie stars are summoned to Mexico for what they think will be a public appearance - only to discover the locals really believe in their heroic abilities and expect them to rid their town of a group of evil bandits. Comedy, starring Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after the Pan Pacific Defense Corps unleashed an army of Jaegers - 25-storey tall robots operated by mind-melded humans - former pilot Jake Pentecost is contacted by estranged sister Mako Mori. She implores him to return to the PPDC to head off the threat posed by Liwen Shao, chief executive of Shao Industries, who intends to replace the Jaegers with unmanned drones. Haunted by ghosts of the past, Jake eventually agrees to mentor a 15-year-old cadet called Amara, whose family were crushed to death during one monster attack. Director Steven S DeKnight's literally blockbusting sci-fi sequel, starring John Boyega, Scott Eastwood and Cailee Spaeny

programme.title: Master and Commander: The Far Side of the World (2003)
programme.desc: The captain of a British warship engages in a tense battle of wits and an escalating test of nerves with a French counterpart during the Napoleonic conflict, a pursuit that takes his crew on a dangerous journey along the coast of South America. Seafaring drama, adapted from Patrick O'Brian's novels, starring Russell Crowe, Paul Bettany, James D'Arcy, Billy Boyd and Edward Woodall

programme.title: The Other Woman (2014)
programme.desc: A woman is devastated to learn her boyfriend is actually married, but when she meets his wife, they quickly become friends. When they discover he has a third secret lover, they decide to join forces and teach him a lesson. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau

programme.title: Submarine (2010)
programme.desc: A 15-year-old boy determined to lose his virginity before he turns 16 becomes infatuated with a feisty classmate. He also has a more pressing mission to undertake as he tries to save his parents' failing marriage, despite his father's apathy and the return of his mother's smooth-talking ex. Comedy drama, with Craig Roberts, Sally Hawkins, Paddy Considine and Noah Taylor

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring a pensioner and a parked car, a bear playing with a bamboo stick, and a Street Fighter impression

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps Angela and Dom Zampogna, whose three children have the pickiest palettes and will only consume unhealthy foods, causing them to throw temper tantrums

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Tristan and Liv hit a rocky patch, James's ego is bruised as Maeva pursues a friendship with her ex Miles, and tensions rise when Sophie Hermann finds out and decides to step in

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring family's frayed relationships?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first

programme.title: The Book of Life (2014)
programme.desc: A man who longs to be a musician instead of a bullfighter like his father has to compete with a childhood friend when they fall for the same woman. Their love triangle catches the eye of the spirits of the dead, leading him on a journey through their bizarre world. Animated adventure, with the voices of Diego Luna, Zoe Saldana and Channing Tatum

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette receives her PhD, and the friends then tease Howard about being the only one among them who is not a doctor. Meanwhile, Raj becomes Sheldon's new flatmate after overhearing Leonard and Priya engaging in a Star Trek bedroom fantasy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny worries about the consequences of spending the night with Raj, and Leonard's reaction confirms her worst fears. Meanwhile, Sheldon is more interested in the upcoming paintball competition, and tries to refocus the boys' attentions as they argue over the previous evening's activities. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is caught in a battle of wills between Sheldon and Penny, while Leonard tries to reignite his long-distance relationship with Priya, who has moved back to India. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard inadvertently gives the impression he is attracted to Amy when he accompanies her to a colleague's wedding. Meanwhile, Howard tries to persuade Bernadette they should live with his mother after getting married and suggests a trial run of the arrangement over the weekend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj feels upset about not being in a relationship, so Penny sets out to find a date and introduces him to a girl he can actually talk to. They hit it off, but when it becomes apparent he has been buying her expensive gifts, his friends suspect she is only interested in his wealth

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's old adversary Wil Wheaton returns and invites everyone to a house-warming party. Leonard is eager to go, but Sheldon threatens to shun him if he attends. However, he soon changes his mind when he finds out that Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Brent Spiner will also be there

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, pop star Nadine Coyle and wheelchair basketball player-turned-presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. Under the watchful eye of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, the celebrity bakers attempt decorative choux buns in the signature and tackle financiers in the technical before making a showstopping cake that represents something from their bucket list

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potter's stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of well-known faces including Denise Van Outen, Nick Grimshaw, Joe Swash, Stacey Solomon, Mo Gilligan, Nicola Adams and Zoe Ball appraise Little Fires Everywhere, The Titan Games, Casino Royale, World Cup Final '66: England v West Germany, Naked Attraction and Bradley Walsh & Son: Breaking Dad

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on My Next Guest Needs No Introduction with David Letterman and Kim Kardashian, Borat Subsequent Moviefilm, the Good Morning Britain interview with Nigel Farage, Strictly Come Dancing, Don't Rock the Boat, The Undoing and BBC News coverage of Covid-19, the English lockdown and the death of Sean Connery

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, turning their attention to shows including Britain's Got Talent, The Shallows, Antiques Roadshow, Line of Duty, Miriam's Dead Good Adventure and University Challenge. Narrated by Craig Cash. First shown in April 2019

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The love restaurant opens its doors once more. Party boy Danny from Essex wants to leave his fun-loving ways behind and find a special woman to settle down with. But when he sits down with straight-talking hairdresser Lauren, he might have had a little too much Dutch courage. High-heel wearing Paolo is back for a second shot at love, meeting fellow Italian Mario, while single mum Claire is hoping Jordanian-born care worker and fellow divorcee Fadi might be the soulmate she is looking for

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Tattooed teetotaller Danny meets Kate, a mother of one who seems like his perfect match, but it remains to be seen whether they'll get on. Other diners include sharp-tongued anaesthetist David who is paired with rugby-loving marketing manager Alex, and 50-year-old warehouse manager Gary hopes 48-year-old Lancashire lass Wendy will be Ms Right

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Aisling Bea leaps cushions and Bob Mortimer educates his rivals on Dumfries and Galloway in the series five final. Presented by Greg Davies and Alex Horne

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's mother comes to visit and woos the gang, but he cannot help feeling jealous of all the attention she is receiving - until a bout of illness lays him low, and he suddenly sees the benefits of having her around. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard has doubts about his feelings for Priya when he kisses a girl he meets in the comic-book store, while the rest of the friends play pranks on Sheldon in celebration of Halloween. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is hurt to discover Penny and Bernadette went shopping for bridesmaid dresses without her. She first turns to a reluctant Sheldon for comfort and later tries to drown her sorrows. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny endure an awkward night at the cinema, both insisting the outing is not a date. Meanwhile, a terrified Sheldon enlists his friends' help when a bird flies into his apartment, but his behaviour soon leaves them exasperated. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Comic-book store owner Stuart asks Amy out on a date, forcing a jealous Sheldon to consider the future of his relationship with her. Meanwhile, the scientists become obsessed with an unusual new card game, and Penny organises a round of Twister. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard confronts the man who tormented him in high school, while Penny realises she did her fair share of bullying in the past and calls the people she targeted to apologise. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy has a date with a mystery man, so Sheldon asks Howard and Raj to help him find a new girlfriend online. When Amy is coy with the details about the guy she's dating, Penny and Bernadette decide to spy on them. Stephen Merchant guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try hanging out as friends when they spend Thanksgiving together at the aquarium. Howard reluctantly agrees to volunteer at a soup kitchen with Bernadette, Raj and Emily. Meanwhile, Penny discovers that Leonard knows more about her than she thought

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is driven to distraction when a tune becomes stuck in his head, while Amy and Dave arrange another date and Howard and Raj discover their band has a fan, but tracking him down turns out to be a mistake. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots are driven into hiding when the human race turns against them. When rediscovered by a kindly inventor and his daughter, they come out of exile to save the world, battling a new breed of human-created Transformers. These deadly new machines were created to hunt them down, but are now growing independent and intend to make use of technology from the Transformers' home planet in a plot that could threaten all life on Earth. Fourth film in the sci-fi adventure series, starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Maze Runner (2014)
programme.desc: A teen arrives in an isolated community of youngsters, with no memory of who he is or the outside world. When another new arrival brings an ominous message, he realises time is running out for the group and they must find an escape route through a deadly labyrinth if they are to survive. Sci-fi adventure based on James Dashner's novel, starring Dylan O'Brien, Kaya Scodelario and Patricia Clarkson

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Sarah Kendall has set the early pace in the series, but fellow contestants Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack and Mike Wozniak still have plenty of time to win points and emerge victorious. Here, Charlotte climbs a ladder with some toilet roll, Mike tries out a new catchphrase and Lee terrifies an innocent member of the public. Alex Horne helps coax the contestants as they attempt to complete Greg Davies' tasks

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Howard notices Bernadette is uncomfortable around children when she helps him perform a magic show at his nephew's birthday party

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard asks Penny out on a date, and they agree to give their relationship another chance. They soon remember why it did not work out in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. The 100th episode of the comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Choirmaster Jay is looking to put dark moments from his past behind him as he moves on from a homophobic attack that left him having to learn to walk again, and hopes investment banker Robbie will accept him for the person he is. Twenty-eight-year-old property manager and glamorous burlesque dancer Becky was once a shy teenager, but her raunchy dance routines have boosted her self-esteem, and her date is with Bristolian Lewis, a budding comedian who is tired of the single life, or as he puts it 'juggling with one ball'

programme.title: Baby Daddy

Erica and Adam go over the top with lavish Mother's Day gifts for Beverly before bringing important requests to her. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

Plus, Matt Tebbutt looks at the best and quickest ways to remove the shell from a hard-boiled egg

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Birmingham pair Derek Hansel and Gina Awoko are looking for a home in Almeria, Spain, that they can eventually retire to and also generate some rental income from. Jasmine Harman shows them a range of properties within their £300,000 budget, from a coastal renovation project to an inland cortijo. However, it remains to be seen whether she can deliver the perfect property in the perfect location

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Having sold a successful business, Ruth and Philip Trinder from Northamptonshire want to buy an apartment on the Balearic island of Majorca, where they can spend half the year. They want somewhere they can entertain family and friends, within easy walking distance of one of the island's stylish ports. With a budget of £300,000 Laura Hamilton sets out to help them find something with the contemporary look they love

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Debra Mann from Reading, Berkshire, has fallen in love with the Bay of the Somme in the north of France, and has set heart on a holiday getaway where she and her sister can spend time with family and friends. Scarlette Douglas shows them both a selection of properties for a £64,000 budget - with plenty of surprises along the way

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
