programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: Spring and Port Wine (1970)
programme.desc: A tyrannically strict Lancashire father brings about the downfall of his family by forcing his daughter to eat a meal against her will. Drama, starring James Mason, Diana Coupland, Susan George and Rodney Bewes

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist talks to Primal Scream singer Bobby Gillespie, who discusses his time in the Jesus and Mary Chain and the records that fuelled his love of music

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright and Chris Hollins follow the work of food inspectors, who protect the public from unhygienic restaurants and potentially harmful foodstuffs

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien may have ulterior motives for inviting Tracey to a posh event, while Sharon makes a tidy profit out of fake Rolling Stones T-shirts. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams travels to the Wiltshire village home of Jim Stoodley, who at the age of 14 stole a US aircraft and took to the air with the intention of killing Adolf Hitler - earning himself a place in the Guinness Book of Records as the youngest pilot in history

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams investigates the ration-book fraudsters and coupon fiddlers spawned by the restrictions of the Second World War, and looks at the career of gangster Frankie Fraser, for whom the war provided an opportunity to get rich quick

programme.title: IBA Unlicensed Legends
programme.desc: Big characters. Great fights. Never seen before amazing action from the ring. Bouts from IBA Boxing's most notorious fighters bring their best game for these high-octane events

programme.desc: A CIA agent is diagnosed with a degenerative condition that results in him being forced to retire from the world of intelligence. Thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Anton Yelchin and Irene Jacob

programme.title: Felicity (1978)
programme.desc: A teenager in a remote Catholic girls' school seeks solace from her repressive life in reading erotic novels and having a secret love affair with one of her classmates. A trip to Hong Kong organised by her parents opens her eyes to more experiences - both good and bad. Australian drama, starring Glory Annen and Jody Hanson

programme.title: Rockets in the Dunes (1960)
programme.desc: A Devon beach is used by local children for racing sand yachts, but their fun may be at an end when the army plan to use the dunes as a training ground. The youngsters rally the local community to save their beach, but the discovery of disused mines complicates things further. Family drama, starring Richard Adam and Fiona Davie

programme.title: IBA Unlicensed Legends
programme.desc: Big characters. Great fights. Never seen before amazing action from the ring. Bouts from IBA Boxing's most notorious fighters bring their best game for these high-octane events

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Soho and Milllwall, with fascinating facts for locals and tourists alike. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

Coverage of the top-flight clash from AMEX Stadium, as Graham Potter's side look for three vital points in their Premier League survival bid. A comprehensive 3-0 victory over relegation rivals Newcastle in their previous home game saw the Seagulls move four points clear of the Magpies, as well as six points clear of the relegation zone.
